from celery import Celery
from flask import current_app
from myapp.web import create_app

flask_app = create_app()
celery = Celery("myapp", broker="redis://localhost:6379/0")


@celery.task
def send_email(user_id, subject, body):
    with flask_app.app_context():
        db = flask_app.extensions["sqlalchemy"]
        user = db.session.query(User).get(user_id)
        mailer = flask_app.extensions["mail"]
        mailer.send(user.email, subject, body)


@celery.task
def process_upload(file_path):
    upload_folder = flask_app.config["UPLOAD_FOLDER"]
    with open(f"{upload_folder}/{file_path}", "rb") as f:
        data = f.read()
    return len(data)
